title: Jamaican Beef Hash
description: A flavorful and spicy Indian-inspired dish made with ground beef, onions, and Jamaican seasoning.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onions and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add ground beef and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add Jamaican seasoning, cumin, coriander, garam masala, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Stir in hash browns and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Shape the mixture into patties or a flat layer.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes on each side, until the hash is crispy and the beef is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
